title: Mes candidatures
subtitle: Consultez vos candidatures recentes et gerez celles qui sont encore en attente de revue.
empty_description: Une fois que vous postulerez a des runs, ils apparaitront ici du plus recent au plus ancien.
summary_fallback: Les details du run et le statut actuel de votre candidature sont resumes ici.
no_notes: Aucune note supplementaire n'a ete ajoutee.
locked_help: Applications can only be edited while they are still pending review. Approved or benched applications can still be withdrawn while the run is active.

sections.active_description: Vos inscriptions encore en cours, en attente ou toujours actives.
sections.active_empty_description: Tout ce qui est encore en cours apparaitra ici.
sections.history_description: Les candidatures passees, refusees, retirees ou autrement terminees restent ici comme reference.
sections.history_empty_description: Une fois qu'une candidature est terminee, refusee, retiree ou archivee, elle apparaitra ici.

withdraw.locked_description: This application can no longer be edited, but it can still be withdrawn while the run is active.
withdraw.confirm_description_application: This application will be moved to your history.
withdraw.confirm_description_run: You will be removed from the roster and this application will be moved to your history.
withdraw.warning_description: You will need to submit a new application if you want to join this run again.
withdraw.success_description: Votre candidature a ete retiree et deplacee vers votre historique.
withdraw.error_description: This application could not be withdrawn right now.
